nasb.text: But if I cast out demons by the finger of God, then the kingdom of God has come upon you.

esv.text: But if it is by the finger of God that I cast out demons, then the kingdom of God has come upon you.

cnv.text: 我若靠　神的能力趕鬼，這就是　神的國臨到你們了。

ccb.text: 但若我是靠上帝的能力赶鬼，就是上帝的国已降临在你们中间了。

csbs.text: 可是，如果我藉着神的能力驱赶鬼魔，那么，神的国就已经临到你们了。
